topStories.description: With US-Ukraine talks set to resume in Florida, Volodymyr Zelenskyy warns Russia is increasing its oil revenues.

topStories.description: With no independent confirmation of Iran’s latest claim and the US firmly denying any loss of aircraft, the situation remains unclear as tensions continue to escalate in the region.

topStories.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister warned the US that the island's military is ready to respond to any aggression as the Trump administration pushes for regime change. He stated that the military is currently preparing for ‘possibility of military aggression’.
